props.ChoiceText: The cargo was worth extra because no honest manifest could have named it.
props.ChoiceBio: A smuggling run taught you how quickly the sea turns legality into a matter of timing.

0.TransitionText: Because a smuggling run taught you how quickly the sea turns legality into a matter of timing, war at sea could become profit under a privateer's commission.
0.TransitionPrompt: This contraband work could carry you into privateering, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a smuggling run taught you how quickly the sea turns legality into a matter of timing, cargo, ports, and bargaining mattered as much as seamanship.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a smuggling run taught you how quickly the sea turns legality into a matter of timing, tide, weather, and hazard remained the terms of your life.
